text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the last day of summer camp, and T.M. Opera
O is standing on the beach...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! A perfect victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I dub this season my victorious summer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: For some reason declaring victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? That's an inquisitive face, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why is it that I'm so content? I can see the
question written plainly on you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My elation... is due to a major achievement of
mine this summer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What do you think it was?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, that is true. Training with the older generation certainly was a boon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I have gained something even more impactful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... It is information, my dear trainer. Information.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By spending time with the racers who came
before, I was able confirm their true strength with
my own eyes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Spe's latent power, Grass's intelligence...
Knowledge is in the details, you see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And my all-seeing Overlord's eye has already laid
all their abilities bare!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How will they act in the time of our inevitable
clash? I can already see it clearly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You will lose, Spe! You will lose, Grass! I already
have the previous generation in the palm of my
hand. Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She was not present, so I have no idea! Haaah ha
ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's not really concerned with the specifics of
what she's saying...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: At any rate, my preparations are set.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us return to the academy so that we may
advance our pieces toward the grand game that is
the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That will serve as the arena of her first major
skirmish against the senior racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have four months. It's time for T.M. Opera O
to dash down the path of the Overlord!
